market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to our spacious 6-bedroom luxury home, perfect for large groups seeking entertainment and comfort. While the property sleeps 4 (double check capacity accuracy), it boasts a standout cinematic experience with a dedicated screening room and games room for unforgettable stays. Ideal for special occasions or movie enthusiasts, this exclusive entire-home rental features [insert missing amenities like 'outdoor garden' or 'secure parking' based on local benchmarks—add based on market research]. With prime location access and no street-level noise, guests can relax amidst [mention nearby attractions]. We pride ourselves on responsiveness and ensuring every stay exceeds expectations. Note: Our price reflects the unique entertainment features not found in standard listings at the median £155 rate.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize the cinema room photo as cover image to showcase the property’s unique differentiator — this premium entertainment feature could justify the high rate when prominently displayed.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate of £770 is 398% above cohort median £155, yet 43.5% occupancy lags below 47.8% median 90-day booked rate for market
No amenity tags listed despite 'facilities' being top local category, costing 15-30% in search ranking per platform benchmarks
Title mentions 6 bedrooms but only 4 guests accommodated—potential mispricing that deters group bookings
analysis.outreach_hook: With £770 nights costing 400% more than local median but only 44% occupancy (underperforming vs 47.8% market), we can help reposition this luxury asset to fill more nights without discounting.
